name: v1alpha1GnuPGPublicKey
description: v1alpha1GnuPGPublicKey schema from Argo CD API

fingerprint.name: Fingerprint is the fingerprint of the key

keyData.name: KeyData holds the raw key data, in base64 encoded format

keyID.name: KeyID specifies the key ID, in hexadecimal string format

owner.name: Owner holds the owner identification, e.g. a name and e-mail address

subType.name: SubType holds the key's subtype (e.g. rsa4096)

trust.name: Trust holds the level of trust assigned to this key
